_sources.discrepancies: NCSL lists WV as 'photo ID requested'. SoS confirms voters without photo ID may present a non-photo ID (utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck, student ID) or vote a provisional ballot. WV offers a free voter ID card. Consistent.

earlyVoting.notes: Early voting available at the county clerk's office. TODO verify dates for 2026 cycle.
Early voting at the county clerk's office. Hours vary by county. TODO verify for 2026 cycle.
Early voting is available at the county clerk's office for approximately two weeks before Election Day. Contact your county clerk for specific hours and locations.

acceptedIds: West Virginia driver's license or state ID card
WV voter ID card (free from county clerk)
Utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck, or other government document showing name and address
votingRules.expirationRule: Photo ID must not be expired. West Virginia provides a free voter ID card to any registered voter who does not have another form of acceptable ID. TODO verify for 2026 cycle.
votingRules.impedimentDeclaration: If a voter does not present an acceptable ID, they may vote a provisional ballot. The ballot is counted if the voter provides acceptable ID to the county clerk within 10 days after the election.
votingRules.phonesAtPollsDetail: West Virginia prohibits use of wireless communication devices in the polling booth. You may bring written notes.
additionalRules: Closed primary: only voters registered with a party may vote in that party's primary. Unaffiliated voters may not vote in a partisan primary.
No legislative primary runoffs in West Virginia.

eligibility: Will be absent from the county on Election Day and during early voting
Working outside the county or state
voteByMail.applicationDeadline: Must be received by the county clerk 6 days before the election
voteByMail.returnDeadline: Must be received by the county clerk by 7:30 p.m. on Election Day
voteByMail.returnDeadlinePlain: Absentee ballot must arrive at the county clerk by 7:30 p.m. on Election Day.
